text.title: Banking Core — Data Residency Rules Examples
text.summary: End-to-end worked example for banking-core-data-residency-rules showing inputs, rule application, and final artefact.

example.title: EU-licensed neobank using EU-region cloud + 1 US analytics vendor

good.description: PII stays in eu-central-1. Analytics vendor receives only pseudonymised aggregates with SCCs + TIA; backups in eu-west-3. Annual TIA review on calendar.

bad.description: Default cloud config replicates to us-east-1. Analytics vendor receives raw PII without SCCs. No TIA. ECB inspection lands; supervisor escalates.
